'''Vohis mold''' was a local export found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]] available at [[Gelgelar Free Port/Legends|Gelgelar Free Port]]. It was used to enhance the flavor of various dishes, including [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]] casserole, [[Ruugian noodle]]s, and [[Vohan bean stew]]. It grew in the [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]] and was harvested by local farmers. They sold it to [[Brack]] who would hire people to ship the moist mold to companies like [[Nebula Consumables]] and [[Falvin Foods]] who would dry and process it. The companies would usually pay between 220 and 250 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per [[Metric ton/Legends|ton]].<ref name="PSG" />
